description: Chrome downloads parser reads History SQLite downloads table and emits BrowserEvent per download
steps: JOIN downloads with downloads_url_chains ON d.id = u.id AND u.chain_index = 0
Filter WHERE start_time > 0, ORDER BY start_time ASC
Attrs: url, target_path, total_bytes (i64), state (i32), danger_type (i32)
Test factory creates both downloads and downloads_url_chains tables
Test: parse_single_download — attrs[url] and attrs[total_bytes] correct
